tool_definitions.name: Spawn
tool_definitions.description: Delegate a task to a specialized sub-agent. The sub-agent runs to completion and returns its output. Use this to parallelize work or leverage domain-specific agents.

steps.message: MCP transport: connecting
MCP transport: connected
Use the Spawn tool with agentName='researcher' to delegate this task: 'What is the Fibonacci sequence? Provide a one-sentence definition.' Then report the researcher's answer verbatim.

tools.name: Spawn
tools.description: Delegate a task to a specialized sub-agent. The sub-agent runs to completion and returns its output. Use this to parallelize work or leverage domain-specific agents.

arguments.description: What is the Fibonacci sequence? Provide a one-sentence definition.

results.content: {"output":"The Fibonacci sequence is a sequence of numbers where each number is the sum of the two preceding ones, usually starting with 0 and 1.\n"}

steps.message: Use the Spawn tool with agentName='researcher' to delegate this task: 'What is the Fibonacci sequence? Provide a one-sentence definition.' Then report the researcher's answer verbatim.
Spawn({"description":"What is the Fibonacci sequence? Provide a one-sentence definition.","agentName":"researcher"})
